name: Doomben Downs
description: A tight turning track that rewards speed and power. Short straight favours horses that accelerate early.

name: Eagle Farm
description: A long sweeping track with a generous straight. The distance tests stamina and rewards genuine stayers.

name: Sunshine Coast Turf Club
description: An undulating track with a tricky camber. Balanced horses thrive here, as do those with natural rhythm.

name: Ipswich Raceway
description: A tight dirt circuit beloved by sprinters and power horses. Stamina matters less here — it is over before it starts.

name: Gold Coast Turf Club
description: Wide open bends and a long run home. All-rounders love this track. End closers find plenty of room to weave.
